Increased Granularity (2 tiers -> 5 tiers). Services excl from NNB. New MY multipler. Q to A Timing

sheets.name: Instructions
data: 1. Select the role tab from the sheets below
2. Enter your inputs in the BLUE cells
3. The calculator will automatically compute commission payout
4. Multi-year deals for AEs use the duration-based acceleration model
5. Retention roles (AM/RM/CSM) use scaled retention and quarterly draw with Q4 true-up
• Universal acceleration rate table for all roles: 1x / 1.25x / 1.5x / 2x / 2.25x
• AEs: Multi-Year incentives use duration-based BCR multipliers (1.2x–2x)
• RMs and CSMs: 80% Retention / 20% Expansion, 75% quarterly draw Q1–Q3
• ISRs: 60% Closed Won Opps / 40% NNB + Pass-Up Incentives ($50/opp + 2%)
• SEs and Partner/Channel: Same structure, universal acceleration table applies
• AE Calculator — AE (100% NNB) and AEAM Hybrid (NNB + Retention)
• SDR Calculator — 80% SQOs / 20% Net New Bookings (Quarterly)
• ISR Calculator — 60% Closed Won Opps / 40% NNB (Quarterly)

workbook.summary:
File: Vimeo_BHG_FY26_Requirements 03032026.xlsx
Sheets (11): "2026 Plan Summary" (200R × 9C), "Instructions" (200R × 2C), "AE Calculator" (200R × 7C), "AEAM Hybrid Calculator" (200R × 7C), "AM Calculator" (200R × 7C), "CSM Calculator" (200R × 7C), "ISR Calculator" (200R × 7C), "Partner-Channel Calculator" (200R × 7C), "RM Calculator" (200R × 7C), "SDR Calculator" (200R × 7C), "SE Calculator" (200R × 7C)
  Sheet "2026 Plan Summary" headers: [Plan Detail from Vimeo Google Sheet]
  Sheet "Instructions" headers: [BHG FY26 Revenue Compensation Calculator]
  Sheet "AE Calculator" headers: [AE Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "AE Calculator" formulas (25 total, sample): G6=C6; G7=IF(C7>0,G6/C7,0); G8=IF(C7>0,C8/C7,0); G15=IF(G8>=1,C7*G7*1,C7*G8*G7*1); H15=G7*1
  Sheet "AEAM Hybrid Calculator" headers: [AEAM Hybrid Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "AEAM Hybrid Calculator" formulas (36 total, sample): G6=C6*IF(C7="OTT",0.6,0.8); G7=C6*IF(C7="OTT",0.4,0.2); G8=IF(C8>0,G6/C8,0); G9=IF(C8>0,C9/C8,0); G10=IF(C10>0,2*C10-1,0)
  Sheet "AM Calculator" headers: [Account Manager Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "AM Calculator" formulas (31 total, sample): G6=C6*G13; G7=C6*G12; G8=2*C7-1; G9=IF(C8<G8,0,IF(C8>=1,1.5,0.5+(C8-G8)/(1-G8))); G10=IF(C9>0,G7/C9,0)
  Sheet "CSM Calculator" headers: [Customer Success Manager Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "CSM Calculator" formulas (29 total, sample): G6=C6*0.8; G7=C6*0.2; G8=2*C7-1; G9=IF(C8<G8,0,IF(C8>=1,1.5,0.5+(C8-G8)/(1-G8))); G10=IF(C9>0,G7/C9,0)
  Sheet "ISR Calculator" formulas (44 total, sample): G6=(C6/4)*0.6; G7=(C6/4)*0.4; G8=G6/C7; G9=G7/C9; G10=C8/C7
  Sheet "Partner-Channel Calculator" headers: [Channel Sales Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "Partner-Channel Calculator" formulas (35 total, sample): G6=C6*C7; G7=C6*C8; C8=1-C7; G8=G6/C9; G9=C10/C9
  Sheet "RM Calculator" headers: [Renewal Manager Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "RM Calculator" formulas (29 total, sample): G6=C6*0.8; G7=C6*0.2; G8=2*C7-1; G9=IF(C8<G8,0,IF(C8>=1,1.5,0.5+(C8-G8)/(1-G8))); G10=IF(C9>0,G7/C9,0)
  Sheet "SDR Calculator" headers: [SDR Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "SDR Calculator" formulas (35 total, sample): G6=C7*0.8; G7=C7*0.2; G8=G6/4; G9=G8/C8; G10=C9/C8
  Sheet "SE Calculator" headers: [SE Commission Calculator — FY26]
  Sheet "SE Calculator" formulas (17 total, sample): G6=C7/C8; G7=C9/C8; G11=IF(G7>=1,C8*G6*1,C8*G7*G6*1); H11=G6*1; G12=IF(G7>1,MIN(G7-1,0.25)*C8*G6*1.25,0)

rules.description: Universal 5-tier acceleration table: 1× (0–100%), 1.25× (100–125%), 1.5× (125–150%), 2× (150–200%), 2.25× (200%+) applied to all roles' tiered components.
Retention scaled payout: floor = 2×TargetRate−1; below floor → 0%; at floor → 50%; at 100% → 150% cap; linear interpolation between thresholds.
Multi-year deal bonus: incremental ARR × BCR × duration multiplier (1.2× for 24mo, 1.35× for 36mo, 1.5× for 48mo, 2× for 60mo+).
AE/AEAM Hybrid renewal multi-year deal bonus at flat 0.50% of prior ARR.
Services bookings earn 50% of the role's primary BCR; Channel roles earn 50% of both Sourced and Fulfilled BCRs.
AE (Named/Ent/MM, SMB-Media): 100% Net New Bookings, annual timing.
AEAM Hybrid: non-OTT 80/20 NNB+Expansion/Retention; OTT 60/40 NNB+Expansion/Retention; annual timing.
AM: non-OTT 80/20 Expansion/Retention; OTT 60/40 Expansion/Retention; annual timing.
ISR: 60% Closed Won Opps / 40% Net New Bookings, quarterly timing.
SDR: 80% SQOs (quarterly) / 20% Regional NNB (annual).
RM: 80% Retention / 20% Expansion, annual timing.
CSM: 80% Retention / 20% Expansion, annual timing, regional crediting.
Channel: Sourced/Fulfilled weights vary by segment — Strategic 100/0, R&D 40/60, Regional-60/40, Regional-50/50.
SE: 100% Regional Bookings, annual timing.
ISR/SDR Manager: 25% Closed Won (ISR rollup), 25% NNB (ISR rollup), 50% SQOs (SDR rollup), quarterly.
CSM/SE Manager: 75% Retention (CSM rollup), 12.5% Expansion (regional), 12.5% Regional Bookings (regional), annual.
CSM/RM retention draw: 75% of quarterly retention variable in Q1–Q3; Q4 annual true-up.
AEAM Hybrid/AM retention draw: 50% of quarterly retention variable in Q1–Q3; Q4 annual true-up.
January 2026: flat draw = 1/12 annual vOTE for all roles; February offline estimated commission; March true-up required.
ISR earns $50 flat per opportunity passed to an AE, regardless of outcome.
ISR earns 2% of closed deal value on passed-up opportunities that close won.
Services bookings are excluded from NNB quota credit; paid separately at 50% BCR.

parameters.condition: Services bookings excluded from NNB credit

rules.description: Multi-year deal bonus requires contract duration ≥24 months to qualify for duration-based BCR multiplier.
Channel credit assignment changed from rep-based to region-based for FY26.
CSM crediting changed from rep-based to regional for FY26.
Mid-period goal changes must support fixed or prorated BCR/quota adjustment options.
Retention component payout capped at 150% of retention variable when actual retention ≥ 100%.
Retention payout drops to 0% below the floor rate (2×TargetRate−1); acts as a minimum threshold gate.

insights: Extraction quality is mechanically strong — the core compensation structures (universal acceleration tiers, retention floor/cap/interpolation model, quarterly draw rates, comp weight splits) are accurately captured and formula-verified against multiple calculator tabs with no rate or threshold errors detected. All three corrections are scoped and low-complexity. The most critical production risk is the CIQ configuration gap: multi-year deal ARR inputs, renewal prior-ARR, ISR pass-up transaction data, and current-quarter tracking are all required by active formula rules but are entirely absent from the Employee Assumptions schema — this will cause build failures before any testing occurs and must be remediated before CIQ configuration begins. Manager-role rules (ISR/SDR and CSM/SE) remain the highest-risk extractions due to absent calculator tabs and single-source Plan Summary inference; both should be gated as provisional and withheld from production deployment until verified. Seven rules have elements that cannot be confirmed due to formula rows falling outside the provided data window; a complete workbook export covering all formula rows is strongly recommended before the extraction is considered closed.

payoutComponents: NNB Commission (AE, AEAM, ISR, SDR, SE, Channel)
Retention Quarterly Draw (AM, AEAM, RM, CSM)
Manager Rollup Payout (ISR/SDR Mgr, CSM/SE Mgr)
planStructure.notes: Monthly periods aggregate into quarterly (ISR, SDR) and annual (all other roles) measurement windows. Retention draws pay Q1–Q3 with Q4 true-up. January 2026 is a flat draw month requiring March true-up. BCR proration toggle (fixed vs prorated) needed for mid-period goal changes.

formulaRecommendations.description: Tiered commission using universal acceleration table.
formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: Calculate attainment, determine BCR, apply marginal rate multiplier per tier on incremental bookings within each band.
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: SmartGrid with TIER_LOOKUP referencing Universal Acceleration Tiers. MARGINAL tier mode. BCR from Employee Assumptions.

formulaRecommendations.description: Retention scaled payout with floor and cap.
formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: Compute floor = 2×TargetRate−1. Below floor: 0%. At/above 100%: 150%. Otherwise interpolate linearly.
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: Custom SmartGrid formula (continuous curve, not discrete tiers). Helper column for Floor. Reference Target Retention Rate from Assumptions.

formulaRecommendations.description: Quarterly retention draw with Q4 true-up.
formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: Q1–Q3: pay DrawRate × (RetentionVariable/4). Q4: MAX(0, AnnualRetentionPayout − 3×QuarterlyDraw).
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: Period Group logic for Q1–Q3 vs Q4. DrawRate from Retention Draw Rates worksheet. Track cumulative draws in running-total column.

formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: For deals ≥24 months: bonus = IncrementalARR × BCR × DurationMultiplier. Renewal MY: PriorARR × 0.5%.
formulaRecommendations.pseudoFormula:
IF DealDuration >= 24 THEN Multiplier = LOOKUP(DealDuration, MultiYearTable); Bonus = ARR * BCR * Multiplier;
RenewalMYBonus = PriorARR * 0.005;
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: VLOOKUP against Multi-Year Deal Multipliers. Deal-level transaction field for DealDuration required. Separate payout line for renewal MY.

formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: Services excluded from NNB quota credit, earn 50% of primary BCR. Channel: 50% of both Sourced and Fulfilled BCRs.
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: Separate payout line filtered by booking_type='Services'. Channel needs two sub-lines for Sourced/Fulfilled services.

formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: $50 per passed opp + 2% of closed-won deal value on passed opps.
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: Requires Passed Opportunities transaction source with PassedDate, DealValue, ClosedWonFlag. Two payout lines.

formulaRecommendations.description: January 2026 flat draw and March true-up.
formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: January = vOTE/12 flat draw. February offline. March true-up reconciles Jan+Feb against actual.
formulaRecommendations.pseudoFormula:
JanuaryPayout = AnnualVOTE / 12;
MarchTrueUp = ActualQ1Commission - JanuaryPayout - FebruaryEstimate;
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: January draw as manual adjustment. February offline tracked as prior-period adjustment. March references both. Use Prior Period Adjustments column.

formulaRecommendations.logicExplanation: ISR/SDR Mgr: sum direct report metrics. CSM/SE Mgr: regional aggregation (not sum-of-reps).
formulaRecommendations.pseudoFormula:
ISRSDRMgr: MgrMetrics = SUM(DirectReports.Metrics);
CSMSEMgr: MgrRetention = RegionalRate; MgrExpansion = RegionalTotal;
formulaRecommendations.captivateiqNotes: CaptivateIQ hierarchical rollup via Manager Rollup Hierarchy. CSM/SE Mgr uses region-level aggregation. Manager quotas set independently in Assumptions.
